envVars.name: SIMMER_API_KEY
envVars.description: Your Simmer API key from simmer.markets/dashboard.

envVars.name: MAX_MARKETS_PER_QUERY
envVars.description: Maximum Kalshi results to inspect per query. Default: 50.

envVars.name: FAIR_PROBABILITY
envVars.description: Fair YES probability used for edge checks. Default: 0.55.

envVars.name: MIN_EDGE
envVars.description: Minimum edge required to print a trade plan. Default: 0.02.

envVars.name: MAX_SLIPPAGE_PCT
envVars.description: Skip candidates with excessive slippage. Default: 0.15.

envVars.name: RANDOM_SEED
envVars.description: Optional random seed for reproducible candidate selection.
